form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into sixth behind Bruntwood Brigade at this track over 2600m in a 4yo+ on April 4. Raced better the start before that with a solid effort when 2nd (Fr2) over 2600m at Rangiora, beaten 5.5 m by Lavra Rose (3:23.40) in 3yo+ on March 29 at $4.10. Pay to forgive him after one bad run; expected to return to form.

form.formComment: Backs up 4 days after failing to impress last start; 9th (Fr14) over 2170m at Motukarara Raceway beaten 13 m by Crimson Tide (2:48.70) in 3yo+ on April 6 at $16.30. Showed ability the run before when he posted a big 3.5 m win as favourite (10m 5) at Phar Lap Racecourse (2:43.80) beating Zoom X in 4yo+ on April 1 at $2.90. Expected to improve sharply.
